description_long: This object is a decorative pennant mounted on a tall, slender pole with a sturdy, square black base. The pennant itself is a vertically hanging banner made of blue fabric, featuring a prominent gold 'X' symbol in the center and bordered by thin red and black stripes. The pole is topped with a gold finial and has gold end caps on the horizontal crossbar that supports the pennant. The base is geometric and solid, likely made of metal or stone, with gold circular accents on its faces. The fabric of the pennant hangs in two pointed tails, giving it a ceremonial or heraldic appearance. The overall design suggests it is used for marking or decoration in public or ceremonial urban spaces.
description: A blue and gold ceremonial pennant with a bold 'X' symbol, mounted on a tall pole with a solid black and gold base. The pennant features pointed tails and decorative trim, giving it a formal, heraldic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue pennant with a gold 'X', red and black trim, and the full decorative pole and base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pennant and the pole, with the banner mostly hidden and the gold finial and base details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the pennant, with the gold 'X' visible in reverse and the same trim and pole details as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pole and base, with the pennant itself mostly out of sight.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant features a large gold 'X' symbol centered on a blue background, bordered by thin red and black stripes. The banner is split into two pointed tails at the bottom.
